summary: Iteration 57: Verified Weekly Pay View and Employee Self-Correction features. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend StaffMyPay page displays weekly breakdown with day-by-day hours, status badges (Approved/Rejected/Pending), Fix buttons on rejected days, and correction form.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py line 517-533: weekly_breakdown correctly generates 7 days (Mon-Sun) with date, day_name, hours, sessions, approved, rejected, reject_reason, record_ids
attendance.py line 536-537: week_approved and week_rejected booleans correctly calculated from weekly_breakdown
attendance.py line 574-613: EmployeeCorrectionRequest model and employee_correction endpoint correctly validates rejected status before allowing correction
attendance.py line 594: Returns 400 if record is already approved
attendance.py line 596: Returns 400 if record is not rejected
StaffMyPay.js line 120-172: Weekly breakdown card displays all 7 days with hours, status badges, and Fix buttons for rejected days
StaffMyPay.js line 175-197: Correction card with hours input, notes input, and submit button
StaffMyPay.js line 199-241: Recent Activity section shows Approved/Rejected/Corrected badges per record
api.js line 652-655: attendanceAPI.myCorrection correctly sends PUT request to /attendance/my-correction

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 passed, 2 skipped due to test data state)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Rejected timesheets for staff user to test correction flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified: (1) GET /api/attendance/my-summary returns weekly_breakdown array with 7 days (Mon-Sun), each containing date, day_name, hours, sessions, approved, rejected, reject_reason, record_ids. (2) week_approved and week_rejected booleans are present. (3) PUT /api/attendance/my-correction allows employee to correct rejected records - sets employee_corrected=true, clears rejected flag, updates hours_worked. (4) my-correction returns 400 if record is not rejected or already approved. (5) StaffMyPay page at /heva-ops/pay shows weekly breakdown card with day-by-day hours and status badges. (6) Fix button appears on rejected days. (7) Correction form shows hours input, notes input, and submit button. (8) Recent Activity shows Approved/Rejected/Corrected badges per record.

weekly_breakdown_7_days.evidence: GET /api/attendance/my-summary returns weekly_breakdown array with exactly 7 entries (Mon-Sun)

weekly_breakdown_structure.evidence: Each day has date, day_name, hours, sessions, approved, rejected, reject_reason, record_ids

week_approved_rejected_booleans.evidence: week_approved and week_rejected booleans present in my-summary response

my_correction_endpoint.evidence: PUT /api/attendance/my-correction successfully updates rejected records with claimed_hours

my_correction_validation.evidence: Returns 400 for non-rejected records and already approved records

staff_my_pay_weekly_breakdown.evidence: Screenshot shows weekly breakdown card with day-by-day hours and status badges

fix_button_on_rejected_days.evidence: Found 3 Fix buttons on rejected days (Wed, Thu, Sat)

correction_form.evidence: Correction card shows hours input, notes input, and submit button with correct data-testid attributes

recent_activity_badges.evidence: Found 14 Rejected badges and 1 Corrected badge in Recent Activity section
